calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-19-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Irene Barrese and Raymond Chan for Aldoush Alpanian.

The Court noted that it received a supplemental declaration which indicated that expenses in the amount of $62,544.09 had been distributed and paid, that this would have left a balance of $38,000.00 and that all that's left is $6.85. Ms. Barrese stated that she has no information on the $38,000.00, that she has a statement showing $6.85, that the Executor did a number of withdrawals for his personal use and that they have communicated with him unsuccessfully. Mr. Chan stated that the Executor took the money for his own use, that the Executor has access to the account, and that he believes the Executor did on line banking and went to the bank in person. Ms. Barrese also stated that the beneficiaries are not aware this and that the Beneficiaries only have notice of the motion to withdraw. The Court granted the Motion for Withdrawal of Attorney of Record (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Tim Kneis. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-22-2017 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-01-2017 Continued To May-22-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Irene Barrese and Raymond Chan for Aldoush Alpanian.

The Court noted that Aldoush Alpanian is not present. Ms. Barese stated that Mr. Alpanian's mail has been returned, that she can not reach him by phone, mail or e-mail, and that his relatives don't know where he is. Mr. Chan stated that the 2016 taxes have already been paid, that there is no communication with the Client, the reserve was for any possible expenses and that $30.00 is what's left from the $38,000.00 reserve. The Motion for Withdrawal of Attorney of Record is continued to May 22, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file a declaration as to what the $38,000.00 was used for and what remains. An Order to Appear will be issued to Aldoush Alpanian to appear on May 22, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
